title: Verify discount offer appears after user persists with cancellation
description: Test that users who continue to cancel after Loss Aversion warning receive a discount offer popup
preconditions: User is on Trial Corner Hub
Discount offer is activated in backend

steps.description: 3. On Loss Aversion popup, click 'Cancel Anyway'

expected_result: Discount offer popup appears with offer title and discounted price from backend, showing 'Lock in 50% off your first month' or similar with trust clause about payment starting after trial ends
